title: Photonics Visualized
description: Photonics Visualized - a mod pack on the new versions of Fabric, with Photonics: A raytracing engine as its core
body:
Photonic Visualized
The Next Generation of Minecraft Realism
Photonics: Ultra Vision is a high-end graphical overhaul for Minecraft 1.21+, built on the Fabric loader. This pack is designed for players who want to push the boundaries of Minecraft’s engine without sacrificing the classic feel of the game.

By combining the revolutionary Photonics: A Raytracing Engine with the timeless aesthetic of BSL Shaders, this collection transforms your world into a cinematic masterpiece featuring physically accurate lighting, stunning reflections, and immersive atmospheres.

🌟 Key Features
Real-Time Raytracing: Powered by Photonics, experience realistic light propagation, soft shadows, and global illumination that breathes life into every block.

The BSL Standard: Fully integrated with BSL Shaders for that iconic, clean, and vibrant look that enhances the skybox, water, and volumetric fog.

Fabric Performance: Utilizing the latest Sodium, Lithium, and Iris stack to ensure that even with raytracing enabled, your frame rates remain smooth and stable.

Modern Visuals: Optimized for Minecraft 1.21+, supporting all the latest blocks and features with updated shaders and lighting effects.

🚀 Optimized for Performance
We believe beauty shouldn't come at the cost of playability. This pack includes a curated suite of optimization mods:

Sodium & Indium: For industry-leading rendering performance.

Lithium: To optimize game physics and tick logic.

FerriteCore: To significantly reduce memory (RAM) usage.

Starlight: For ultra-fast lighting engine calculations.

🛠️ Installation & Requirements
Loader: Requires Fabric Loader (1.21 or higher).

Memory: We recommend allocating at least 4GB–6GB of RAM for the best experience.

GPU: A dedicated graphics card (NVIDIA RTX or AMD RX series recommended) is suggested to get the most out of the raytracing features.
